content.en:
It is not difficult for Ye Tian to want the Dao-level natal talents of these True Ancestors, he first finds those True Ancestors who can determine the location, and he doesn't need to get too close to them, he only needs to copy the talent to be able to detect them, and he can copy their Dao-level natal talents.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to approach those True Ancestors who had already determined their location and copied a door-level natal talent.

And some true ancestors are located inside their sects, and some sects are located in spaces that are open to people to enter, and even to visit.

Ye Tian also entered the domain boundary fragment space of those sects, approached their sect headquarters one by one, and copied these Dao-level natal talents.

But there are still some sects that prohibit outsiders from entering, so there is only another way.

"Sneak in!"

Ye Tian naturally did not sneak into the domain fragments where other sects were located with his deity, but copied the body of an invincible true ancestor with his copying talent, and then used the body of that invincible true ancestor to sneak into the domain fragment space of those sects.

Of course, this is easy to find, but as long as Ye Tian's identity is not revealed, he will not have the slightest worry.

And just like that, year after year.

It took Ye Tian ten years to finally copy all the Dao-level natal talents of the True Ancestors on the list one by one, and integrate them one by one into his own Dao-level natal talents.

These Dao-level natal talents involved all kinds, and it can be said that Ye Tian would not have the slightest restriction on cultivating any Dao technique in the future.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to fuse Dao-level natal talents with similar attributes, of which there were six Dao-level natal talents about speed.

Ye Tian fused these six Dao-level natal talents, and it would take about 300,000 years in total.

Under the acceleration of 10,000 times time, only thirty years have passed, and the six Dao-level natal talents have completely merged into a brand-new Dao-level natal talent.

This brand-new Dao-level talent was named Extreme Speed by Ye Tian!

The Extreme Speed Dao-level natal talent is much stronger than other speed-level Dao-level natal talents, and it not only contains speed, but also has other characteristics of the previous six Dao-level natal talents.

In short, the Dao-level natal talent after the fusion contains all the characteristics of the six Dao-level natal talents, and there will be no weakening, only strengthening.

"Now that I start cultivating and comprehending Tiangang's extreme speed, I don't know how much the cultivation effect will increase?"

With anticipation, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Thousand Dao Technique of Tiangang Extreme Speed.

As soon as he cultivated, Ye Tian felt that it was completely different from before, the cultivation effect was too good, at least ten times better than before, it was simply a qualitative improvement.

Moreover, in the past, Shenwu Tiangang's extreme speed would occasionally fall into a small bottleneck, and it would take a long time to break it, but now there is no bottleneck at all.

"It's such a fast ascension speed, if you go down at this cultivation speed, it won't take long for you to step into the Dacheng realm!"

Ye Tian estimated.

In the following days, Ye Tian cultivated and comprehended Tiangang's extreme speed.

In the blink of an eye, 200,000 years have passed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian finally broke the shackles and quickly raised Tiangang to the Dacheng realm.

Suddenly, the strongest speed record on the Xuanxu list was broken by Ye Tian!

At this moment, Ye Tian had six Xuanxu Ancient Realm records, dazzling the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Even the Bloody General and the Ferris General were shocked when they learned of this.

Black Wind Mountain.

The three generals were sitting together drinking.

Two of them were the Blood Demon General and the Sky General, while the other young man had a pale face and looked badly injured, and he was the last general of one of the three major generals of the Black Wind Mountain, General Fengxing.

General Fengxing is also an invincible true ancestor, but his strength is not as good as that of the bloody general, and he is an invincible true ancestor at the elite level.

Because the injuries he received before were too serious, the origin was damaged, so he never woke up, not long ago he woke up, with the help of some healing treasures and the effect of the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, he slowly recovered.

Although he still can't completely recover now, he can barely exert the combat power of the invincible True Ancestor.

At this time, the three major generals were chatting with Ye Tian.

"General Jiuji is really amazing, he broke the record for the strongest defense before, and now he has broken the record for the strongest speed. I'm afraid his strength is no weaker than that of the bloody general!"

The Ferris General said with a smile.

The Bloody General shook his head and said, "You have estimated that you have underestimated the Nine Extremes General, and his strength may have surpassed mine! With his current progress, I am afraid it will not be long before he breaks the record for the strongest attack." At that time, he is afraid that he will be the first true ancestor of the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

"First True Ancestor, I'm afraid not, don't forget, the Heavenly Emperor Palace hasn't appeared yet!" said the Ferris General.

When it came to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, General Fengxing and General Bloody frowned.

The bloody general said in a low voice: "At the beginning, the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Vast Sea Ancestor personally ordered the Upper Triple Heaven Force to meet the enemy, and even our Black Wind Mountain was forced to participate in the battle. The headquarters of Black Wind Mountain can hide from other forces, but it can't hide from the Mighty Sea Ancestor. The other party is in control of the domain realm, and in the domain realm, no force can be hidden! However, the behavior of the Vast Sea Ancestor is very strange, why did he forcibly send one-third of the domain boundary into the Dark Forbidden Realm? Moreover, did he really die in battle?"

"Don't forget, why did the battle of the Domain Realm start? The Vast Sea Realm is also an incomparably ancient domain realm in the Divine Heaven Realm, and there are countless powerhouses that have walked out, and there are even many geniuses who have become the disciples of the domain ancestors. If there were no huge benefits, no one would dare to launch a Domain Shattering Battle!But in that battle, the enemies who participated in the battle came from many legendary forces, and there were even three Domain Ancestors besieging the Vast Sea Ancestors, what treasures do you say they are for?" General Fengxing said curiously.

"I don't know, but I'm sure that most of the power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has not fallen, and now it must be hidden in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but they are hidden too deeply, and it is estimated that they have blocked the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, otherwise it would have been exposed long ago!" said the Ferris General.

"By the way, General Jiuji is already an invincible true ancestor, and it is even possible that he has surpassed me, so he should be recommended to become the fourth general of Black Wind Mountain!" General Bloody proposed.

"It is not a trivial matter to be crowned a general, now that the six kings have not completely awakened, the other heavenly kings are also sleeping, and we are not qualified to canonize the general, we can only be canonized by the six kings themselves. "

Ferris General said.

"In this case, I'll go and ask the Wind King for his opinion!"

The bloody general said.

"It's good!"

General Ferris and General Wind Star nodded.

Soon, General Bloody contacted the Wind King and told him about the canonization of Ye Tian as a general.

The Wind King immediately replied, and ten years later, he canonized Ye Tian as the fourth general of Black Wind Mountain.

Subsequently, General Bloody contacted Ye Tian and told Ye Tian about the canonization of the general.

------------------

"Canonized General!"

Ye Tian knew that the generals of Black Wind Mountain were actually different, the other generals were all ordinary generals, and above the ordinary generals were the three generals.

General Blood, General Stormstar, and General Skyfly.

These three generals are the real decision-makers at the level of the True Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, and they have the right to command ordinary generals.

And there are many advantages to becoming a general, first of all, you can get more inheritance, but the most important benefit is that you have the right to talk directly to the Six Kings, and occasionally you can also get the guidance of the Six Kings.

Of course, this is only the benefit that Ye Tian has learned, as for whether there are other benefits, it will only be known after becoming a general.

In the blink of an eye, ten years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the small realm of the Wind King.

in one space.

Countless True Ancestors stood around as spectators, and the three generals, General Blood, General Ferris, and General Fengxing, all arrived to greet Ye Tian.

Today, a wisp of consciousness of the Wind King will forcibly descend here.

It was just a wisp of consciousness that came, and it was a short coming, and the price paid was not large, but it was enough to see the grandeur of the canonization of the general.

If it weren't for the Ancient Realm, I'm afraid the Wind King would have come in his true body.

Ye Tian stood on the canonization platform, and the three generals contacted the Wind King.

Rumble!!!!

The rules of the ancient realm retreated, and an illusory figure gradually became clear.

I saw a very handsome young man appear in front of Ye Tian, this person was the Wind King, one of the six remaining kings of Black Wind Mountain.

Although it was only a wisp of consciousness descending, Ye Tian felt a great pressure.

This is also the first time that Ye Tian has seen a strong person above the Supreme True Ancestor (Ouyang Jiu'er is not counted, he is just a reincarnated body, and he has no power!).

"I've seen the Wind King!"

Ye Tian bent down and said respectfully.
